_index.baseline: pre-unification oracle numbers (06-12, post-P13 Jacobi fix) - NEVER delete
_index.harness: REPL snippet to reproduce the baseline

harness.setup: Pkg.activate(repo); Pkg.add("CUDA") LOCAL ONLY; using XCALibre,CUDA,Adapt,Serialization,SparseArrays,LinearAlgebra; S=XCALibre.Solve; e=open(deserialize,"/home/humberto/casesXCALibre/F1-fetchCFD_Minimal/f1_pressure_systems.bin")[1]
harness.device_A: I,J,V=findnz(parent(e.A)); A=XCALibre.ModelFramework._build_A(CUDABackend(),I,J,V,n); b=adapt(bk,e.b); F32: cast V and b
